Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The temporal profile is a model describing the average and the standard deviation of the times between couples of activities that eventually follow each other in at least one process execution

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For a given trace like A B C D the pairs A B A C A D B C B D and C D must be considered

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given a positive value ZETA a deviation occurs when the observed time between two activities in a particular execution is either significantly lower than AVG minus ZETA times STDEV or significantly higher than AVG plus ZETA times STDEV

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The temporal profile is expressed as a Python dictionary associating pairs of activities as tuples to a tuple of average time and standard deviation of their temporal distances

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process involves multiple steps spanning procurement inspection assembly testing packaging and distribution

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Each execution of this process involves the following activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each pair of activities that appear in this global supply chain process in the event logs not only directly connected but eventually following each other assign an estimated average time and standard deviation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The dictionary keys should be tuples of activity labels and the values should be tuples of average time standard deviation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Please construct a dictionary that includes a representative subset of these activity pairs ensuring complexity by considering pairs of activities that may be separated by multiple steps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are supposed to produce a Python dictionary representing the temporal profile for a global supply chain process for manufacturing high tech electronics It has multiple steps SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to produce a dictionary with keys as tuples of activity labels and values as tuple average time standard deviation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are asked for each pair of activities that appear in this global supply chain process in the event logs not only directly connected but eventually following each other So we need to include pairs like SS RC SS QI etc

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will produce some representative subset We can choose these pairs SS OP OP RC RC QI QI CA CA PT PT PK PK WS WS DT DT AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also pairs that are eventually following each other not directly adjacent SS RC OP QI RC CA QI PT CA PK PT WS PK DT WS AS

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Maybe that is a good representative subset

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to assign estimated average time and standard deviation for each pair Let me produce plausible estimates for these times

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: SS OP average 7200 standard deviation 3600 OP RC average 172800 standard deviation 21600 RC QI average 1800 standard deviation 900 QI CA average 3600 standard deviation 600 CA PT average 7200 standard deviation 1800 PT PK average 3600 standard deviation 900 PK WS average 1800 standard deviation 600 WS DT average 3600 standard deviation 900 DT AS average 259200 standard deviation 7200

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SS RC is the sum of delays from SS OP and OP RC and if we assume independent delays then standard deviation is combined from both uncertainties

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I can create the following dictionary temporal profile with direct pairs indirect pairs and more non adjacent pairs
